lastReleaseMessage: v0.57.5 preship gauntlet expansion + audit-driven polish

barRaise.topFinding: Nothing in the repo moved since the 06-07 review: the latest commit is still f9d690d (v0.57.5, 2026-06-06), so a full bar-raise cycle passed with zero commits and none of yesterday's six open actions closed. The tooling churn did stop as advised, which is the right call, but the M1 slice is still unbuilt, the audio set is still zero files with no named source against the v0.4.0 mute-MVP lock, and the five scripts/*.ps1.bak files committed in v0.57.4 are still tracked with no *.bak rule in .gitignore. A project paused at the point where the next move has to be product, not pipeline. One quiet day is fine; a second no-slice cycle tips this to at-risk.
